attributes.name: OIC - 10U Travel Tryout Tune-Up Clinic June 2026
attributes.description:
Bears 10U Tune-Up Clinic
Want to get ready for Tryouts? OIC is excited to offer Tune-up clinics to all travel players to help you gear up for your tryouts! These 4 sessions will continue skills developed during spring season and prepare for upcoming Fall season tryouts! 

Birth years (2016-17) 

10U Tune-Up Schedule: 
Mon June 1 5:30pm - 6:30pm (NHL) 
Wed June 3 5:30pm - 6:30pm (NHL) 
Mon June 8 5:30pm - 6:30pm (NHL) 
Wed June 10 5:30pm - 6:30pm (NHL)
